description: Single source of truth for cross-platform DSP constants. Edit values HERE, then run `npm run gen:constants` to regenerate the per-language files. CI (`npm run check:constants`) fails if the generated files drift from this spec. See docs/DSP_CONTRACT.md. NOTE: when the C++ ports adopt hardware/dsp_constants_generated.h, remove the matching #defines from config.h/dsp.h first (a textual #define of YIN_THRESHOLD etc. would collide with the constexpr).

SNR_GREEN_DB.doc: a-posteriori SNR at/above which readings are trusted freely (green tier).

SNR_YELLOW_DB.doc: SNR below which trust collapses to the red tier; the green/yellow ramp spans yellow..green.

SNR_VOICE_BAND_LO_HZ.doc: Low edge of the voice band SNR is measured over (excludes sub-300 Hz rumble).

SNR_VOICE_BAND_HI_HZ.doc: High edge of the voice-band SNR window.

OVERSUB_MIN.doc: Spectral over-subtraction factor in clean SNR (gentle; avoids musical noise).

OVERSUB_MAX.doc: Spectral over-subtraction factor at/below the red SNR edge (aggressive).

NOISE_PROFILE_UPDATE_RATE.doc: Per-pause EMA rate for re-tracking the per-bin noise profile.

UPDATE_CONF_GATE.doc: Confidence at/above which the resonance estimate updates (D4).

ALERT_CONF_GATE.doc: Confidence at/above which directional feedback (haptic/UI) fires (D4); stricter than UPDATE_CONF_GATE.

YIN_THRESHOLD.doc: YIN CMND threshold for pitch detection (lower = stricter).

PITCH_CONFIDENCE_FACTOR.doc: Maps YIN CMND to confidence: conf = 1 - cmnd * factor. Canonical = web's value; the C++ ports' 3.0 was drift, reconciled here (adopt on next C++ sync).

FORMANT_BW_REJECT_HZ.doc: LPC roots with bandwidth above this are rejected as non-formants.

TILT_LOW_LO_HZ.doc: Canonical tiltDb low-band low edge (D3: raw fixed band).

CAPTURE_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ.doc: Mic capture rate on the embedded/native ports. Web is browser-determined (often 48000) and intentionally omitted.

LPC_ORDER.doc: LPC order for the formant envelope. Web derives it adaptively from the downsampled rate; the C++ ports use a harmonic envelope (no LPC) today, so both are omitted (D2).
